Co Pilot Security Marketplace
Version: 4.0.8
Build Name: AGENCY LIVE GPS BOOT FIX
Date: 2026-06-27

Summary:
- Fixes v4.0.7 boot freeze on “Preparing app”.
- Removes the self-recursive Live GPS route prep override that could stop startup before login/dashboard render.
- Removes the self-recursive property coordinate fallback created by function hoisting.
- Keeps v4.0.7 Agency Live GPS route visibility behavior.
- Adds boot failsafe so a startup data-load issue returns to login instead of hanging forever.

Badge:
v4.0.8 AGENCY LIVE GPS BOOT FIX

SQL:
No schema change required. Optional SQL reload file included.
